CONTENT.Career: Doucet is a youth product of Elan Sorinières Football and Landreau Loroux OSC before joining the youth academy of Nantes in 2012. He signed his first professional contract with Nantes on 8 December 2021. He made his professional debut with Nantes in a 1–1 Ligue 1 tie with Brest on 10 April 2022, coming on as a late sub in the 92nd minute.On 3 August 2023, Doucet joined Paris FC in Ligue 2 on a season-long loan.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Doucet is of Burkinabé descent.
CONTENT.External links: Lohann Doucet at BDFutbolLohann Doucet – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in French

SUMMARY: Lohann Doucet (born 14 September 2002) is a French professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for  Ligue 2 club Paris FC, on loan from  Ligue 1 club Nantes.
